patterns.title: First beat
patterns.code:
// drums - Ctrl+Enter to play, Ctrl+. to stop
sound("bd hh sd hh")

patterns.title: Wobble bass
patterns.code:
// a wobbly bassline
note("c2 eb2 g2 bb2").sound("sawtooth").lpf(sine.range(300,1200).slow(4))

patterns.title: Chords + arp
Full groove
patterns.code:
// a whole little track - change any number and re-run
setcpm(120/4)
stack(
  sound("bd*2 ~ sd ~").bank("RolandTR909"),
  sound("hh*8").gain(saw.range(.3,.8).fast(2)),
  note("c2 ~ c2 g1").sound("sawtooth").lpf(700),
  n("0 2 4 6").scale("C:minor").sound("piano").room(.5).gain(.6)
)
